description: Letter from an unidentified Nagid to R. Abraham regarding an insubordinate cantor. Given this shelfmark's prior identification as late and Dotan Arad's attribution of the letter to a Nagid, it likely dates to the 14th-early 16th centuries (no later than 1517CE). Date: 14th c, 15th c, 16th c. MCD.
description_he: מכתב מנגיד בלתי מזוהה אל ר' אברהם בענין חזן סרבן. ייתכן מהמאה ה-14 עד תחילת ה-16.
